parameters.query:
WITH hourly_avg AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(AVG(hourly_cost), 0) AS avg_cost
  FROM (
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', occurred_at) AS h, SUM(amount_usd) AS hourly_cost
    FROM bridge.expenses
    WHERE occurred_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
    GROUP BY h
  ) t
),
last_hour AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_usd), 0) AS cost
  FROM bridge.expenses
  WHERE occurred_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
)
SELECT last_hour.cost AS last_hour_cost, hourly_avg.avg_cost,
  CASE WHEN hourly_avg.avg_cost > 0
       THEN ROUND(last_hour.cost / hourly_avg.avg_cost, 2)
       ELSE 0 END AS spike_ratio,
  last_hour.cost > hourly_avg.avg_cost * 3 AS is_spike
FROM last_hour, hourly_avg;

SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'loop_detected') AS loops_last_30min,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'auto_block_repeated_rejection') AS autoblock_last_30min,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type ILIKE '%error%') AS errors_last_30min,
  COUNT(*) > 5 AS is_loop_storm
FROM bridge.workflow_events
WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
  AND event_type IN ('loop_detected','auto_block_repeated_rejection','error','parse_failed');

SELECT agent_name,
  today.success_rate AS today_rate,
  week_avg.avg_rate AS week_avg_rate,
  today.success_rate < week_avg.avg_rate - 20 AS is_drifting,
  today.tasks_total,
  authority_level
FROM (
  SELECT agent_name, authority_level,
    ROUND(100.0 * tasks_success / NULLIF(tasks_total, 0), 1) AS success_rate,
    tasks_total
  FROM bridge.agent_performance WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE AND tasks_total >= 3
) today
JOIN (
  SELECT agent_name,
    ROUND(AVG(100.0 * tasks_success / NULLIF(tasks_total, 0)), 1) AS avg_rate
  FROM bridge.agent_performance
  WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY agent_name
) week_avg USING (agent_name)
WHERE today.success_rate < week_avg.avg_rate - 20;

WITH hourly_avg AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(AVG(cnt), 0) AS avg_memos
  FROM (
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at) AS h, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM bridge.agent_memos
    WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
    GROUP BY h
  ) t
),
last_hour AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM bridge.agent_memos
  WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
)
SELECT last_hour.cnt AS last_hour_memos, ROUND(hourly_avg.avg_memos) AS avg_memos,
  last_hour.cnt > hourly_avg.avg_memos * 5 AS is_volume_spike
FROM last_hour, hourly_avg;

WITH log_anomaly AS (
  INSERT INTO bridge.workflow_events (workflow_name, event_type, details_json)
  VALUES ('anomaly_detector', 'anomalies_detected',
    jsonb_build_object('anomalies', $1::jsonb, 'critical_count', $3::int))
  RETURNING event_id
),
alert_cos AS (
  INSERT INTO bridge.agent_memos
    (from_agent, to_agent, memo_type, priority, subject, body_json)
  VALUES (
    'anomaly_detector', 'chief_of_staff',
    CASE WHEN $3::int > 0 THEN 'critical_system_alert' ELSE 'system_health_alert' END,
    CASE WHEN $3::int > 0 THEN 'urgent' ELSE 'high' END,
    'Anomaly detected: ' || $2,
    jsonb_build_object('anomalies', $1::jsonb, 'report', $2)
  ) RETURNING memo_id
)
SELECT (SELECT event_id FROM log_anomaly) AS logged,
       (SELECT memo_id FROM alert_cos) AS alerted;
